title: Bigger US strike on Iran today? Trump’s 'mild' warning as 48-hour deadline expires today
summary_full: US President Donald Trump has issued a stark warning to Iran. He demands the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours. Failure to comply will result in severe consequences, including the obliteration of Iran's power plants. Iran has responded with its own threats. Tehran vows to target US-linked assets in the Gulf if its energy infrastructure is attacked.
